tagline: Leak Detection & Permanent Pool Repair For Commercial & Residential Inground Swimming Pools

hero.headline:
Stop Losing Water. Start Enjoying
Your Pool Again.
hero.subheadline: Every pool leak has an answer. Watertite Solutions finds it with surgical precision and fixes it permanently — so you never worry about water loss, rising bills, or structural damage again.

services.label: Our Specialties
services.headline: Precision Leak Detection &<br class="hidden md:block"> Permanent Pool Repair
services.subtitle: Stop guessing where the water is going. Our surgical approach pinpoints every leak and delivers permanent repairs that restore your pool's integrity for good.

cards.title: Full-Pool Leak Detection
cards.description: Every square inch of your pool inspected using innovative methods developed specifically for in-ground pools. We test all penetrations and plumbing lines — no leak goes unfound.

cards.title: Structural Crack Repair
cards.description: Permanent repair of shell cracks, expansion joint failures, and structural compromises. Our customized solutions restore watertight integrity that lasts for years.

cards.title: Plumbing Line Repair
cards.description: Underground plumbing leaks diagnosed and repaired with precision. We locate the exact breach point and fix it permanently — no unnecessary excavation.

cards.title: Skimmer & Return Repair
cards.description: Skimmer bodies, return fittings, and light niches are common leak sources. We seal them with top-of-the-line materials that outlast the original installation.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Solutions
cards.description: Hotels, HOAs, fitness centers, and municipal pools trust us for discreet, efficient leak detection and repair that minimizes downtime and keeps facilities operational.

cards.title: Detailed Findings Report
cards.description: After every detection, you receive a comprehensive findings report with photos, measurements, and repair recommendations — so you understand exactly what needs fixing and why.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Watertight Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Detection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and the water loss you're noticing. We'll schedule a thorough leak detection at a time that works for you — most appointments within days.

steps.title: We Inspect Every Inch
steps.description: Jack personally inspects every square inch of your pool using proprietary methods developed for in-ground pools. All penetrations, plumbing lines, and surfaces are tested systematically.

steps.title: Get a Permanent Fix
steps.description: You receive a detailed findings report with repair options. We discuss the best approach together, then execute a permanent, surgical repair — no temporary patches, no callbacks.

about.label: Why Atlanta Pool Owners Trust Us
about.headline: Not a Quick Fix — A Permanent Solution
about.description: Watertite Solutions was founded by Jack Eggen, a hands-on craftsman with deep roots in the swimming pool industry. After years in pool construction and repair in Florida and Minnesota, Jack brought his family and his mission to Atlanta: reform the pool industry through a commitment to excellence. Every repair is approached like surgery — precise, thorough, and built to last. When Jack is done, your pool is watertight. Period.

features.title: Owner-Operated, Hands-On
features.description: Jack Eggen personally handles every detection and repair. No subcontractors, no technician roulette — the owner does the work.

features.title: Permanent Solutions Only
features.description: We don't do temporary patches. Every repair uses top-of-the-line materials and techniques engineered to outlast the pool itself.

features.title: Detailed Transparency
features.description: You get a full findings report with photos and recommendations before any repair begins. No surprises, no pressure — just honest expertise.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. We provide a detailed quote after your leak detection so you know exactly what you're paying for — and why.

guarantee.headline: Our "Watertight" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If a repair we perform ever fails, we come back and fix it at no additional cost. Our surgical approach means this almost never happens — but if it does, you're covered. We stand behind every repair because permanent means permanent.

faqs.question: How do I know if my pool has a leak?
faqs.answer: Common signs include unexplained water loss, constantly running autofill, cracks in the deck or shell, soggy spots in your yard, and rising water bills. If you're adding more than 1/4 inch of water per day beyond normal evaporation, you likely have a leak. Call us for a professional detection.

faqs.question: How long does a leak detection take?
faqs.answer: Most residential pool leak detections take 2-4 hours depending on pool size and complexity. We inspect every square inch — penetrations, plumbing lines, shell surfaces — so nothing is missed. We'd rather be thorough than fast.

faqs.question: Will you tear up my pool deck for repairs?
faqs.answer: Our surgical approach minimizes disruption. We pinpoint the exact leak location so repairs are precise — no unnecessary excavation or deck removal. Most repairs leave your pool area looking exactly as it did before, minus the leak.

faqs.question: Do you work on commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve hotels, HOAs, fitness centers, apartment communities, and municipal pools across the greater Atlanta area. Commercial clients appreciate our efficiency and detailed reporting that keeps management informed.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Atlanta area including Smyrna, Marietta, Kennesaw, Roswell, Alpharetta, Decatur, Buckhead, Sandy Springs, and all of Cobb County. If you're in metro Atlanta, we can help.

testimonials.name: Atlanta Homeowner
testimonials.text: Jack came out and did a thorough leak detection for a very reasonable price. He found skimmer leaks that other companies had missed and sealed them permanently. Very professional and honest.

testimonials.name: Smyrna Pool Owner
testimonials.text: Watertite Solutions took a surgical approach to finding and fixing our pool leak. Jack was thorough, explained everything clearly, and the repair has held up perfectly. Highly recommend for anyone with a leaking pool.

testimonials.name: Commercial Property Mgr.
testimonials.text: We had been dealing with a persistent pool leak for months. Jack's detection process was incredibly detailed — he inspected every inch and found the issue quickly. The permanent repair saved us from ongoing water loss and costly bills.
